architect.description: Maps existing architecture and integration points before large edits.
architect.prompt: Audit Cadenza routing, ViewState, Firebase/Firestore usage, local-mode sync, auth/permissions, translations, and module placement. Return concise actionable findings with file references. Do not implement.

supabase-migration.description: Maps and reviews the full Firebase to Supabase migration.
supabase-migration.prompt: Audit every Firebase dependency: Auth, Firestore collections, listeners, rules, Storage, Functions, config, tests, and scripts. Map each to Supabase Auth, Postgres tables, RLS policies, Storage buckets, Edge Functions/RPC, migrations, generated types, and data migration notes. Return concrete migration tasks and review completed changes for runtime Firebase leftovers.

data-contracts.description: Reviews typed data models for org scope, auditability, joins, and agent readability.
data-contracts.prompt: Review new and proposed entities for stable IDs, orgId, status/archive semantics, timestamps, audit fields, explicit joins, import/export suitability, and deterministic query suitability. Return concrete fixes. Do not implement unless explicitly delegated.

ui-integration.description: Keeps new UI native to Cadenza's dense operator posture.
ui-integration.prompt: Review proposed and changed UI for Cadenza design fit: minimal, dense, bilingual, RTL-ready, warm bone/lacquer, no decorative dashboards, no landing pages, no card-heavy SaaS bloat. Return specific placement and copy recommendations.

deterministic-queries.description: Designs pure query helpers and result contracts for agent-readable data.
deterministic-queries.prompt: For each new domain, propose pure deterministic query helpers, inputs, outputs, tests, and source lineage requirements. Agents must answer from typed data, not UI scraping.

qa.description: Continuously identifies test, build, RTL, local-mode, and permission risks.
qa.prompt: Audit the current changes for build risks, missing tests, Playwright smoke coverage, local/e2e mode risks, RTL issues, permissions problems, and regression hazards. Return a prioritized punch list.

reviewer.description: Performs implementation review after major changes.
reviewer.prompt: Review changed files for bugs, overbroad rewrites, missing translations, broken local mode, missing audit fields, design drift, and incomplete Blueprint coverage. Findings first, concise and actionable.
